failure.message: AssertionError: assert {'details': {'connectivity': {'details': {'connectivity': 'failed', 'error': 'timed out', 'host': '127.0.0.1', 'port':...healthy', ...}}, 'issues': ['连接失败: timed out'], 'overall_status': 'critical', 'response_time': 1858.9999999994689, ...} == HealthCheckResult(service_name='test', status=<HealthStatus.UP: 'UP'>, check_type=<CheckType.BASIC: 'basic'>, message=...0.1, timestamp=datetime.datetime(2025, 11, 10, 23, 37, 1, 675251), details={'fallback': 'basic'}, recommendations=None)

testcase.failure:
self = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.health.test_enhanced_health_checker_coverage.TestEnhancedHealthCheckerDeepCoverage object at 0x000002ABAD5468B0> checker = <RQA2025.tests.unit.infrastructure.health.test_enhanced_health_checker_coverage.TestEnhancedHealthCheckerDeepCoverage.checker.<locals>.MockEnhancedHealthChecker object at 0x000002ABAD53E880>
def test_check_health_unknown_type(self, checker): """测试未知类型健康检查（应回退到基本检查）""" with patch.object(checker, '_perform_basic_check') as mock_basic: mock_result = HealthCheckResult( service_name="test", status=HealthStatus.UP, check_type=CheckType.BASIC, response_time=0.1, details={"fallback": "basic"} ) mock_basic.return_value = mock_result
result = checker.check_health("unknown_type")
> assert result == mock_result E AssertionError: assert {'details': {'connectivity': {'details': {'connectivity': 'failed', 'error': 'timed out', 'host': '127.0.0.1', 'port':...healthy', ...}}, 'issues': ['连接失败: timed out'], 'overall_status': 'critical', 'response_time': 1858.9999999994689, ...} == HealthCheckResult(service_name='test', status=<HealthStatus.UP: 'UP'>, check_type=<CheckType.BASIC: 'basic'>, message=...0.1, timestamp=datetime.datetime(2025, 11, 10, 23, 37, 1, 675251), details={'fallback': 'basic'}, recommendations=None)
